66836616: When using Kecare as a blog, we need a landing page (i.e., the homepage) to display the list of blog articles.
c4c805df: ## What is a Landing Page Template
1d7a2d00: The landing page template is a `.list.ts` file, stored in the `.kecare/` directory. The generator will call it after processing all articles to generate the article list page.
c56f878b: In summary, `.list.ts` only requires you to return an array containing `fsPath` and `template`. The generator can then correctly call the template for page generation. Because pagination design is needed, theme authors must write the pagination logic here. The array can also contain a single item (if you are not implementing pagination design, you can directly return `fsPath: xxx, template: xxx`).
d8c09892: We have called `<Landing/>` in the template, so next we should proceed to writing the page component.
7767d2ce: In Vue, the way to use data is through text interpolation, like `Article Title: {{ article.frontMatter.title }}`. It's quite simple, and that's pretty much it. As for the specific styling, you'll have to use your imagination.
